description_long: This object consists of three modern residential houses arranged side by side, each with its own small yard or garden area. The houses feature flat and low-pitched roofs, large windows, and a mix of brick and painted exterior finishes. Each house has a distinct colored front door—red, blue, and yellow—adding visual interest and individuality. The yards are landscaped with grass, stepping stones, and a central tree, and there are visible outdoor furnishings such as benches and tables. The houses have balconies, rooftop access, and various window arrangements, suggesting a contemporary urban neighborhood setting. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor spaces, and a blend of privacy and community.
description: A group of three modern houses with flat and low-pitched roofs, large windows, and landscaped yards, each featuring a distinct colored door and outdoor furnishings.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three houses, their colored doors, landscaped yards, and central tree with outdoor furniture.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the houses, balconies, and the arrangement of windows and rooftop features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyards, rear facades, and additional outdoor spaces of the houses.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side walls, more window placements, and the spatial relationship between the houses.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Distinct colored doors with small steps, minimal overhangs, and landscaped front yards
